mapper.select: SELECT ep.event_pricing_seq ,ep.event_seq ,ep.price_type ,ep.price_name ,ep.currency_code ,ep.amount ,ep.sales_start_at ,ep.sales_end_at ,COALESCE(payment_usage.sold_count, 0) AS sold_count FROM event.event_pricing ep INNER JOIN event.events e ON e.event_seq = ep.event_seq AND e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.is_paid IS TRUE AND LOWER(COALESCE(e.registration_type, 'direct')) = 'direct' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event.event_pages pg WHERE pg.event_seq = e.event_seq AND pg.deleted_at IS NULL AND pg.use_yn = 'Y' AND pg.page_status = 'published' ) LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.status = 'paid') AS sold_count FROM event.payments p WHERE p.event_pricing_seq = ep.event_pricing_seq ) payment_usage ON TRUE WHERE ep.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND ep.deleted_at IS NULL AND ep.use_yn = 'Y' AND ep.currency_code IN ('USD', 'KRW') ORDER BY ep.sort_seq ASC, ep.event_pricing_seq ASC

SELECT ep.event_pricing_seq ,ep.event_seq ,ep.price_type ,ep.price_name ,ep.currency_code ,ep.amount ,ep.sales_start_at ,ep.sales_end_at FROM event.event_pricing ep INNER JOIN event.events e ON e.event_seq = ep.event_seq AND e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.is_paid IS TRUE AND LOWER(COALESCE(e.registration_type, 'direct')) = 'direct' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event.event_pages pg WHERE pg.event_seq = e.event_seq AND pg.deleted_at IS NULL AND pg.use_yn = 'Y' AND pg.page_status = 'published' ) WHERE ep.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND ep.event_pricing_seq = #{eventPricingSeq} AND ep.deleted_at IS NULL AND ep.use_yn = 'Y' AND ep.currency_code IN ('USD', 'KRW') FOR UPDATE

SELECT dc.discount_code_seq ,dc.event_seq ,dc.discount_code ,dc.discount_type ,dc.discount_value ,dc.currency_code ,dc.applies_to_price_type ,dc.usage_limit ,COALESCE(payment_usage.used_count, 0) AS used_count ,COALESCE(payment_usage.payment_count, 0) AS payment_count ,dc.valid_from_at ,dc.valid_to_at ,dc.use_yn ,dc.sort_seq FROM event.event_discount_codes dc LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.status = 'paid') AS used_count ,COUNT(*) AS payment_count FROM event.payments p WHERE p.event_seq = dc.event_seq AND p.discount_code_seq = dc.discount_code_seq ) payment_usage ON TRUE WHERE dc.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND UPPER(dc.discount_code) = UPPER(#{discountCode}) AND dc.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY dc.discount_code_seq DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT dc.discount_code_seq ,dc.event_seq ,dc.discount_code ,dc.discount_type ,dc.discount_value ,dc.currency_code ,dc.applies_to_price_type ,dc.usage_limit ,COALESCE(payment_usage.used_count, 0) AS used_count ,COALESCE(payment_usage.payment_count, 0) AS payment_count ,dc.valid_from_at ,dc.valid_to_at ,dc.use_yn ,dc.sort_seq FROM event.event_discount_codes dc LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.status = 'paid') AS used_count ,COUNT(*) AS payment_count FROM event.payments p WHERE p.event_seq = dc.event_seq AND p.discount_code_seq = dc.discount_code_seq ) payment_usage ON TRUE WHERE dc.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND UPPER(dc.discount_code) = UPPER(#{discountCode}) AND dc.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY dc.discount_code_seq DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE OF dc

SELECT LOWER(p.email) AS email ,p.first_name ,p.middle_name ,p.last_name ,p.organization_name ,p.position ,p.country ,p.phone ,p.address ,p.city ,p.nationality ,COALESCE(p.residence_country, p.country) AS residence_country FROM event.participants p WHERE LOWER(p.email) = LOWER(#{email}) ORDER BY p.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST, p.participant_seq DESC LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO event.participants AS current_participant ( email ,first_name ,middle_name ,last_name ,organization_name ,position ,country ,phone ,address ,city ,nationality ,residence_country ) VALUES ( LOWER(#{email}) ,#{firstName} ,NULLIF(#{middleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,#{lastName} ,NULLIF(#{organizationName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,NULLIF(#{position,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,NULLIF(COALESCE(#{country,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{residenceCountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}), '') ,NULLIF(#{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,NULLIF(#{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,NULLIF(#{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,NULLIF(#{nationality,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,NULLIF(COALESCE(#{residenceCountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{country,jdbcType=VARCHAR}), '') ) ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE SET first_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.first_name, current_participant.first_name) ,middle_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.middle_name, current_participant.middle_name) ,last_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.last_name, current_participant.last_name) ,organization_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.organization_name, current_participant.organization_name) ,position = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.position, current_participant.position) ,country = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.country, current_participant.country) ,phone = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.phone, current_participant.phone) ,address = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.address, current_participant.address) ,city = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.city, current_participant.city) ,nationality = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.nationality, current_participant.nationality) ,residence_country = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.residence_country, current_participant.residence_country) ,updated_at = now() RETURNING participant_seq

INSERT INTO event.event_participants ( event_seq ,participant_seq ,status ,registered_at ,cancelled_at ,cancel_reason ) VALUES ( #{eventSeq} ,#{participantSeq} ,'registered' ,now() ,NULL ,NULL ) ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT event_participants_event_seq_participant_seq_key DO UPDATE SET status = 'registered' ,cancelled_at = NULL ,cancel_reason = NULL RETURNING event_participant_seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event.event_participant_profiles ( event_participant_seq ,event_seq ,participant_seq ,email ,first_name ,middle_name ,last_name ,phone ,organization_name ,position ,address ,city ,nationality ,residence_country ) VALUES ( #{eventParticipantSeq} ,#{eventSeq} ,#{participantSeq} ,LOWER(#{participant.email}) ,NULLIF(#{participant.firstName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,NULLIF(#{participant.middleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,NULLIF(#{participant.lastName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,NULLIF(#{participant.phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,NULLIF(#{participant.organizationName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,NULLIF(#{participant.position,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,NULLIF(#{participant.address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,NULLIF(#{participant.city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,NULLIF(#{participant.nationality,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,NULLIF(COALESCE(#{participant.residenceCountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{participant.country,jdbcType=VARCHAR}), '') ) ON CONFLICT (event_participant_seq) DO UPDATE SET event_seq = EXCLUDED.event_seq ,participant_seq = EXCLUDED.participant_seq ,email = EXCLUDED.email ,first_name = EXCLUDED.first_name ,middle_name = EXCLUDED.middle_name ,last_name = EXCLUDED.last_name ,phone = EXCLUDED.phone ,organization_name = EXCLUDED.organization_name ,position = EXCLUDED.position ,address = EXCLUDED.address ,city = EXCLUDED.city ,nationality = EXCLUDED.nationality ,residence_country = EXCLUDED.residence_country ,updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT payment_intent_seq ,pg_provider ,pg_mid ,pg_order_id ,amount ,currency ,payment_method ,status ,raw_response::text AS raw_response ,event_seq ,event_pricing_seq ,original_amount ,discount_amount ,refunded_amount ,payer_name ,payer_email ,payer_country ,first_name ,middle_name ,last_name ,organization_name ,position ,failed_reason ,completed_at ,payment_seq ,created_by ,created_at ,updated_by ,updated_at FROM event.payment_intents WHERE pg_order_id = #{orderId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT payment_seq ,pg_provider ,pg_mid ,pg_transaction_id ,pg_order_id ,amount ,currency ,payment_method ,status ,paid_at ,failed_reason ,event_seq ,event_participant_seq ,participant_seq ,payer_name ,payer_email ,payer_country ,event_pricing_seq ,original_amount ,discount_code_seq ,discount_amount ,refunded_amount ,created_by ,updated_by FROM event.payments WHERE event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND event_pricing_seq = #{eventPricingSeq} AND participant_seq = #{participantSeq} ORDER BY payment_seq DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT payment_seq ,pg_provider ,pg_mid ,pg_transaction_id ,pg_order_id ,amount ,currency ,payment_method ,status ,paid_at ,failed_reason ,event_seq ,event_participant_seq ,participant_seq ,payer_name ,payer_email ,payer_country ,event_pricing_seq ,original_amount ,discount_code_seq ,discount_amount ,refunded_amount ,created_by ,updated_by FROM event.payments WHERE pg_order_id = #{orderId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT payment_seq ,pg_provider ,pg_mid ,pg_transaction_id ,pg_order_id ,amount ,currency ,payment_method ,status ,paid_at ,failed_reason ,event_seq ,event_participant_seq ,participant_seq ,payer_name ,payer_email ,payer_country ,event_pricing_seq ,original_amount ,discount_code_seq ,discount_amount ,refunded_amount ,created_by ,updated_by FROM event.payments WHERE pg_order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT p.payment_seq ,p.pg_order_id AS order_id ,p.status ,p.amount ,p.currency ,e.title AS event_title ,pr.price_name ,p.pg_transaction_id ,p.pg_response_code ,p.pg_response_message ,p.failed_reason ,p.paid_at ,p.created_at FROM event.payments p LEFT JOIN event.events e ON e.event_seq = p.event_seq LEFT JOIN event.event_pricing pr ON pr.event_pricing_seq = p.event_pricing_seq WHERE p.pg_order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT pi.payment_seq ,pi.pg_order_id AS order_id ,pi.status ,pi.amount ,pi.currency ,e.title AS event_title ,pr.price_name ,NULL AS pg_transaction_id ,NULL AS pg_response_code ,NULL AS pg_response_message ,pi.failed_reason ,NULL AS paid_at ,pi.created_at FROM event.payment_intents pi LEFT JOIN event.events e ON e.event_seq = pi.event_seq LEFT JOIN event.event_pricing pr ON pr.event_pricing_seq = pi.event_pricing_seq WHERE pi.pg_order_id = #{orderId}
